name: Moku Moku
overview: Moku Moku offers an irreverent take on life in rural Maui. Following the hilarious day-to-day life of three young locals and their struggles of living in paradise, the series puts a comedic spin on small-town life of different types of people: Kanaka, Transplants, Paniolo, Surfers, Addicts, Tourists... Moku Moku takes its audiences beyond the beaches and away from the hotels as we head to the hills of the "upcountry" and get to know a rich vibrant community of Maui's modern-day working class. More than just a comedy, Moku Moku is an opportunity to start a conversation about the trials and tribulations of living in paradise while trying to keep a perspective on the things that matter most to us.
